Fluevog: Thanks for letting me know, and no problem at all! If you're referring to these boots - https://usvog.attn.tv/aaKIpG37HVQl These run small and narrow. We suggest sizing up by a half-size, or a full size for wider feet. The removable insole may be too thick, making the boots fit 1/2 size smaller. Without it, they fit true to size and give extra toe room. You can replace the insole with a thinner one if needed. If you're between sizes, it's best to size up. Our shoe fitting is very specific to the style of the shoe. I'd also recommend checking out the reviews on the product page as some shoes have quite a few reviews to help you with sizing questions. If you're still in doubt, let me know the size you usually wear so I can check on this with the team for you!

Those are indeed the shoes! It's good to know about the small and narrow fit. My Super Vogs are all 9s, and fit like a dream. I have a pair that says "Dadio" on the sole that at 8.5 I can barely squeeze my foot into, and a dressier shoe that is an 8.5 and is tight, but wearable. I'm not sure of the style name, but I can send you pictures if that would help.
Oh. One pair of supervogs is an 8.5. it fits well, though.

Fluevog: Our shoe fittings are specific to each style, so I recommend checking out the reviews on the product page as some shoes have several reviews that can provide helpful insights on sizing. Regarding the Manifold Cadet Fluevog X Star Trek: Strange New Worlds, these shoes tend to fit small and narrow in the toe area. We suggest going half a size up from your usual size. If you have wider feet, consider sizing up by a whole size. It's worth noting that these boots feature a removable insole that may be too thick for some wearers.
